segments.text: O Lord my God, in you do I take refuge
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Save me from all my pursuers and deliver me
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: not a deliverer: Heb. not a deliverer

segments.text: Lest like a lion they tear my soul apart, rending it in pieces, with no one to deliver
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord my God, if I have done this, if there is wrong in my hands
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I have repaid my friend with evil or plundered my enemy without cause
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the enemy pursue my soul and overtake it, and let him trample my life to the ground and lay my glory in the dust
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arise, O Lord, in your anger; lift yourself up against the fury of my enemies
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Awake for me; you have appointed a judgment
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the assembly of the peoples be gathered about you; over it return on high
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord judges the peoples; judge me, O Lord, according to my righteousness and according to the integrity that is in me
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: My buckler is upon God: Heb. My buckler is upon God
judgeth: or, is a righteous judge

segments.text: A God who feels indignation every day
If a man does not repent, God will whet his sword; he has bent and readied his bow
He has prepared for him his deadly weapons, making his arrows fiery shafts
Behold, the wicked man conceives evil and is pregnant with mischief and gives birth to lies

footnotes: He made a pit: Heb. He hath digged a pit

segments.text: He makes a pit, digging it out, and falls into the hole that he has made
His mischief shall return upon his own head, and on his own skull his violence shall descend
segments.speaker: David
